productDisplayName: SDL by Sweet Dreams Women Blue Night suits
description: Style NotePerfect to slip into on a lazy day, to wear at a girly pyjama party or just for after-hours at home, these pyjama sets from SDL Loungewear instantly transport you to a world of calm. Crafted from soft cotton in pretty and feminine styles, they offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit.Product DetailsTurquoise blue pyjama top has a round neck, short puffed sleeves, vents at the hem and graphic print with diamante embellishments on chestMatching full-length pyjama bottoms in white and turquoise blue poodle print, elasticated waist with drawstrings, pockets on the sidesMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach, dry clean or iron on decoration or printTumble dry, normal, low heatIron low and dry in shade   Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
